title: Help Shin Eva theater booklet
wikitext:
[]: Help - Shin Eva theater booklet             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jan 06, 2021 3:17 am So we have confirmation that as usual a theater booklet will be sold at cinemas. It has 80 pages this time, there is no longer limited edition like with 3.0, and it will include interviews with cast, Mahiro Maeda and Kazuya Tsurumaki, and some production material. Basically if you look at the one for 3.0, I imagine it'll be like that. Here's what's dangerous about these books, for anyone who wasn't there 8 years ago. They are SPOILERS. You have the design sheets for every Eva, character and whatnot, and screenshots of major movie scenes. A lot. Basically social media will be full of pictures of this book mere hours after the film comes out. There's your warning. Now on to the actual point of this topic. I don't know if I'm alone on this, but this book is like an obligatory item in my collection, however I want to stay unspoiled. I have a feeling that when it starts to get sold second hand, anyone selling it (sites like Mandareke) will be showing more than the cover... Basically the question I wanna ask is if there is either a brave soul willing to risk spoilers or someone who just doesn't care, who is also interested im getting the book and could share linls and warnings with us spoiler avoid folk. The goal here is to actually get to buy the book without seeing anything and having it collect dust until the film has been seen. Anyone up for this would be saving our asses (or my ass if I'm alone on this). The Japanese title for the book is 『シン・エヴァンゲリオン劇場版』劇場用パンフレット. And here's the cover: (It seems it actually looks washed out like that.)

[]: Re: Help - Shin Eva theater booklet             Quote Post by intermediateO » Wed Jan 06, 2021 7:26 am I'm planning on getting the pamphlet when I go see it in a few weeks, but I'm kinda unsure of your worry. You can track down pretty much any movie pamphlet in Japan years after the fact and still purchase them, second-hand of course. If you just want to have it after you've seen the film yourself, I don't think you have anything to worry about and can just completely ignore it until then. Also. Total bummer that there's seemingly no Anno interview.

[]: Re: Help - Shin Eva theater booklet             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jan 06, 2021 7:35 am ∆ Are you sure? I assumed it'd be really hard to get after the fact.

[]: Re: Help - Shin Eva theater booklet             Quote Post by Joseki » Wed Jan 06, 2021 7:37 am https://order.mandarake.co.jp/order/det ... et&lang=en The Q pamphlet is available for 400 yen on Mandarake

[]: Re: Help - Shin Eva theater booklet             Quote Post by intermediateO » Wed Jan 06, 2021 7:40 am Yup yup. You can even still get the Death & Rebirth and End of Eva pamphlets easily. https://auctions.yahoo.co.jp/search/sea ... 1&b=1&n=60

[]: Re: Help - Shin Eva theater booklet             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jan 06, 2021 7:46 am You just gave me hope.
